title: Stardom's Sync
description: This mod syncs real life time and weather data into Minecraft!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a43651030f41d93513552412b5d05c15e16ab466.png)

**This mod syncs real life time and weather into the game!**
- Also adds the /realtime command to debug what time the game thinks it is in real life
- Adds the /syncweather command to manually sync the weather, also syncs every minute
